requestedOutcome: Implement the V2 Capability Operating Layer using the approved execution plan.
goal: Close V2 W1-W9 with private capability candidates, Memory/Skill acceptance, Agent-callable Workers, policy guards, UI surfaces, eval, browser QA, and cleanup evidence.
successEvidence: Frontend lint/build passes without style regression edits.
Local Docker runtime health and Alembic current/head pass.
basic, spec_complete, and capability_layer eval suites pass at 100%.
Windows Chrome capability-layer browser QA passes and generated QA records are cleaned.
stopCondition: Stop when W9 final verification passes, V2 problem-list items are closed, and no Critical/Important review findings remain.
nonGoals: No frontend redesign or global style changes.
No team capability publishing or marketplace.
No arbitrary user hooks or full admin Managed Settings in this phase.
No host Python or host Node as application runtime.
scope: V2 Capability Operating Layer W1-W9 implementation and final verification.
